creator: majo-bugs.freebsd.org@cerny.sk
text:
I just want to confirm, that disabling ASLR works for me.

I am migrating our servers from 12.4 to 13.3 (with mod_php81). As expected, apache24 was crashing on graceful reload even with bundled pcre (see Bug 275522). After disabling ASLR (kern.elf64.aslr.enable=0, kern.elf64.aslr.pie_enable=0) it does not crash. (So I will run without ASLR for now.)
